{{Infobox character
| name = Tartarus Incarnation
| aliases = Incarnation of Tartarus
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| titles = Tartarus Incarnation
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus]] [[Incarnation]], also known as the [[Incarnation]] of [[Tartarus]], is a massive ten-foot metal giant clad in gleaming mirrored [[steel]] armor. Characterized by a voice resembling grinding stones and eyes made of blank metal gears, the entity possesses immense physical strength and an unstoppable momentum that allows it to push against multiple [[Nye]] simultaneously. In combat, the creature can manifest seemingly endless metal shards from its grip to impale enemies and uses a clockwork gaze to pin targets. Although it can be damaged or temporarily broken apart, the entity has the ability to pull itself back together at the will of [[King]] [[Zakareth]]. While it possesses a formidable presence, the [[Incarnation]] has shown signs of limited comprehension regarding certain languages and can exhibit petty behavior when following destructive commands. It appears to be bound by specific restrictions or honors regarding its combat engagements.}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|After being defeated in battle, the [[Tartarus]] [[Incarnation]] managed to escape. This ten-foot titan is characterized by [[steel]] armor and eyes composed of blank metal gears. While within the [[House of Blades]], the entity began the process of pulling itself back together. Ultimately, the incarnation met its end when [[Mithra]] passed through its neck to secure victory.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus Incarnation]] was defeated in battle but escaped.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus Incarnation]] has [[steel]] armor.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Incarnation]] of [[Tartarus]] began pulling himself together within the [[House of Blades]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus Incarnation]] has eyes made of blank metal gears.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus Incarnation]] is a ten-foot titan.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus Incarnation]] was defeated by [[Mithra]] passing through its neck.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
